remediation: Security fix (R1/5): GroupChat invite_cancelled render branch now uses msg.senderPubkey (protocol-enforced) via resolveCancellerDisplay() instead of structured.by (attacker-controlled). resolveCancellerDisplay exported from parseStructured.ts and unit-tested with 3 new trust-boundary tests including an explicit forged-by scenario proving the spoofing vector is closed.
notes: InviteCancelledChatAnnouncement uses gray accent to differentiate from blue poll announcements. parseStructured extracted to parseStructured.ts; GroupChat imports parseStructured and resolveCancellerDisplay. invite_cancelled branch in StructuredContent union, parseStructured, and GroupChat render switch. Canceller always derived from msg.senderPubkey; structured.by is parsed for protocol completeness but never used for display. All ACs (CPI-15 through CPI-17) verified. Security issue resolved.
